---
name: "Enhancement"
about: "Suggest an improvement to an existing component"
title: "[ENH] <short description of the suggested enhancement>"
labels: ["Enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## ✨ Enhancement Summary

Briefly describe the enhancement you are proposing.

## 🔧 Affected Component(s)

Which part of the project does this enhancement relate to?

## 📋 Current Behavior

Describe the current behavior or limitations that this enhancement addresses.

## 🛠️ Proposed Change

Clearly describe the enhancement or improvement you'd like to make.

## 🎯 Motivation

Why is this enhancement needed? What benefit will it bring to users or developers?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? If so, why was this one chosen?

## 📎 Additional Context

Add any screenshots, diagrams, or references to relevant issues or PRs if applicable.
